title: Profiling, Event-Loop Health, Memory, Load, and Capacity · Contract Lens: Cpu Memory Eventloop Profile
summary: A team optimizes microbenchmarks, measures only average latency, ignores coordinated omission and warmup, raises concurrency until throughput peaks, and has no resource or cost model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts cpu memory eventloop profile increment in performance experiment and capacity envelope. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use CPU profiles, heap snapshots, allocation, garbage collection, event-loop delay, handles, and request traces to locate causal bottlenecks safely.
Translate user latency and throughput outcomes into request-path budgets, resource hypotheses, experiment controls, and stop conditions before optimizing.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Predict Cpu Memory Eventloop Profile · Theory Cpu Memory Eventloop Profile
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory team handles case 4416 in a recovery drill following an uncertain transaction commit. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to gate tail latency with event-loop and utilization capacity evidence; record only bounded redacted diagnostic fields; then make OpenAPI and runtime disagree on nullability and block the release. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use CPU profiles, heap snapshots, allocation, garbage collection, event-loop delay, handles, and request traces to locate causal bottlenecks safely.
